sections.paragraph:
ἀγριόω (‘make wild’ Trag., X. et al.; 3 Macc 5:2 ἀγριωθέντας; TestSol 13:5 ἠγριωμέναι). Pass. in act. sense, fig., become wild/uncontrolled of humans Hs 9, 26, 4 (Diod S 19, 6, 6; Appian, Iber. 96 §417; the act.= ‘cause to become wild’ TestSim 4:8 ἀγριοῖ τοῦτο τ. ψυχήν).—DELG s.v. ἀγρός.

Trag.

Trag. = writer (s) of tragedy

trag. = tragedy, writer (s) of tragedy

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

act. act. = active

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

TestSim TestSim = Testament of Simeon, s. Test12Patr—List 2

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 15
